description_long: This is a modern, angular house set on a sloped, irregularly shaped plot with a mix of grass and paved surfaces. The structure features a flat roof and a combination of light gray and dark stone-textured exterior walls, giving it a contemporary appearance. Large rectangular windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light and visual interest. The front includes a driveway leading to a garage with a dark door, and a recessed main entryway. The rear of the house opens onto a grassy area, with the building partially embedded into the terrain. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a blend of natural and industrial materials.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with light gray and dark stone walls, large asymmetrical windows, and a garage, set on a sloped grassy plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage door, main entryway, and a mix of stone and light gray walls.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, flat roof, and the transition from paved to grassy terrain.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with large windows and the house embedded into the grassy slope.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the stepped terrain, flat roof, and asymmetrical window placement.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with steps, minimal overhang, and a prominent garage door
